items.briefing:
Origin Energy has confirmed a data breach following unauthorised access to customer information. If you are an Origin customer, be alert for phishing emails or scam calls using your personal details — criminals often exploit stolen data quickly. There are no other major Australia-specific incidents reported today.

Separately, global researchers warn that cybercriminals are increasingly using AI tools to help carry out attacks, making threats faster and harder to spot. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected email or call claiming to be from Origin Energy or any utility, don't click links — contact the company directly using details from their official website.

featured.title: Origin Energy confirms customer data breach after unauthorised access
featured.quote: Major Australian energy provider's customer data breach directly impacts millions of households nationwide.
